projects.description: Pgbelt is a CLI tool used to manage Postgres data migrations from beginning to end, for a single database or a fleet, leveraging pglogical replication.

projects.name: corrosion
projects.description: Gossip-based service discovery (and more) for large distributed systems.

projects.name: moff-station-14
projects.description: A fork of upstream Space Station 14 with a focus on silly antics, custom content, and MRP.

projects.name: analysis-model
projects.description: A library to read static analysis reports into a Java object model

projects.name: proxyscraper
projects.description: Proxy Scraper (HTTP & SOCKS)

projects.name: mystmd
projects.description: Command line tools for working with MyST Markdown.

projects.name: goldenmatch
projects.description: Entity resolution toolkit — deduplicate, match, and create golden records. 27 MCP tools on Smithery. Zero-config. 97.2% F1.

projects.name: mdfried
projects.description: A markdown viewer for the terminal that renders images and big headers

projects.name: open-install-library
projects.description: New Relic's open instrumentation installation recipe database and service
